flags.note: αἰώνιος — "eternal" (timeless) vs. "age-long" (pertaining to the coming age). Some argue it describes quality of life in the Age to Come, not mere duration.
δίκαιος — "righteous" (moral quality) vs. "just" (legal standing). Paul uses this in both senses, and which reading shapes entire doctrines of justification.
